title: One Punch Ends Bellamy’s Boast
description: The Saruyama Alliance finishes the ship’s upgrades as the Straw Hats get ready for the impossible launch.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this scene centers on Bellamy, Sarquiss, Mont Blanc Cricket, Luffy, Nami. The Saruyama Alliance finishes the ship’s upgrades as the Straw Hats get ready for the impossible launch.

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: That's a name that takes me back.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hardly, I'm still just a new-recruit.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Back when I was an independent pirate...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Passing off a mere letter to me...?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: So how could it wreck my health?

dialogue.speaker: Masira
dialogue.text: If you got that, then Scram.

dialogue.speaker: Shojo
dialogue.text: Hahaha... That old man never changes...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But this is no laughing m-

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I've never been so humiliated like this!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Whoa, whoa now. Hold your horses.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: B-But... my pride's been com- pletely trampl-

summary: The Saruyama Alliance finishes the ship’s upgrades as the Straw Hats get ready for the impossible launch.
